@for (vendor of vendors(); track vendor.id) { }
{{ 'vendors.table.vendor' | transloco }} {{ 'vendors.table.contact' | transloco }} {{ 'vendors.table.work' | transloco }} {{ 'vendors.table.financials' | transloco }} {{ 'vendors.table.compliance' | transloco }} {{ 'vendors.table.portal' | transloco }} {{ 'vendors.table.actions' | transloco }}
{{ vendor.name }}
@for (s of stars; track s) { } {{ vendor.average_rating ? (vendor.average_rating | number: '1.1-1') : '-' }}
@if (vendor.phone) { {{ vendor.phone }} } @else { {{ 'vendors.missingPhone' | transloco }} } @if (vendor.email) { {{ vendor.email }} } @else { {{ 'vendors.missingEmail' | transloco }} }
{{ vendor.open_orders ?? 0 }} {{ 'vendors.openOrdersShort' | transloco }} {{ vendor.completed_orders ?? 0 }} {{ 'vendors.completedOrdersShort' | transloco }}
{{ vendor.pending_balance | tenantCurrency }} {{ 'vendors.pendingPayable' | transloco }} {{ vendor.paid_total | tenantCurrency }} {{ 'vendors.paidTotal' | transloco }}
@if ((vendor.compliance_score ?? 0) >= 80) { } @else { } {{ vendor.compliance_score ?? 0 }}%
{{ vendor.has_account ? ('vendors.portalActive' | transloco) : ('vendors.portalPending' | transloco) }}
